candidate_definitions.text: Master workflow orchestrator with autonomous task-to-production automation, quality gates, and multi-agent review
Autonomous workflow orchestrator that takes a task from discovery to production through 12 coordinated phases - exploration, planning, implementation, multi-agent review, and shipping.
Complete PR workflow from commit to production with validation
End-to-end PR workflow - commit, push, create PR, monitor CI, address every review comment, merge, deploy, validate - plus discovery-first release automation.
Example project to demo testing and hosting a chart repository with GitHub Pages and Actions
A GitHub Action to turn a GitHub project into a self-hosted Helm chart repo, using helm/chart-releaser CLI tool
A GitHub action to turn a GitHub project into a self-hosted Helm chart repo, using [helm/chart-releaser](https://github.com/helm/chart-releaser) CLI tool.
A GitHub Action to lint and test Helm charts
A GitHub Action for installing the [helm/chart-testing](https://github.com/helm/chart-testing) CLI tool.
A GitHub Action for Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes
Build animated charts in Jupyter Notebook and similar environments with a simple Python syntax.
Super simple build framework with fast, repeatable builds and an instantly familiar syntax – like Dockerfile and Makefile had a baby.
A GitHub action to create a pull request for changes to your repository in the actions workspace
Build, present and share animated data stories in Jupyter Notebook and similar environments.
Interactive CLI that bumps your version numbers and more
Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud
Dagger is a platform for automating software delivery. It can build, test and ship any codebase, reliably and at scale.
Swagger 2.0 middlware and mocks for Express.js
An easy to use CLI tool to manage your project versions and its upgrades according to the Semantic Versioning specification
An easy to use CLI tool to manage your projects current version and its upgrades according to the Semantic Versioning
Docker image to export Godot Engine games. Templates for Gitlab CI and GitHub Actions to deploy to GitLab Pages/GitHub Pages/Itch.io.
Docker image to export Godot Engine games and deploy to GitLab/GitHub Pages and Itch.io using GitLab CI and GitHub Actions.
Kelos - The Kubernetes-native framework for orchestrating autonomous AI coding agents.
Python package for producing spherical histograms
An opinionated Python package template for pure Python packaging. A package in under 5 minutes with: copier copy gh:pyopensci/pyos-package-template .
